visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium close-up of a young woman with long, dark brown hair and thick bangs, looking into the camera with a smile. She is wearing a soft, mauve-colored knit sweater. Her makeup is prominent, featuring pink-toned eyeshadow, rosy blush, and a vibrant red lip tint. The background is a simple, brightly lit indoor space, possibly a room at home, with a neutral-colored wall and a glimpse of a textured shutter behind her. (2) The scene shifts to a tighter close-up of the woman's lips as she begins a makeup demonstration. She carefully applies a red liquid lip tint to her lips, pressing them together to distribute the color. Small animated sparks appear on screen around her lips to emphasize the visual effect. Her hands are steady as she manipulates the product, showing the transformation of her lip texture and color. (3) Further close-up shots show the woman using a black cushion puff to gently tap her lips, softening the edges of the color. She then uses a slim pink lip liner to define and slightly overline her lips for a fuller appearance. The lighting remains bright and focused on her lower face, highlighting the glossy finish and the precision of the application. (4) The woman holds up a white and metallic product tube from the brand ANNAEVERYDAY, pointing to the applicator. The scene cuts to a close-up of the product label which clearly states "Made in Japan". She then applies the clear lip oil directly onto her lips using a metallic ball applicator, which glides smoothly over her skin, creating a high-shine, plumped look. (5) A split-screen or "Before and After" comparison is shown, highlighting the difference in lip volume and glossiness. The "Before" side shows her natural lips with a pale pink tint, while the "After" side shows the fully finished, shiny, and defined "MulMul Lip". She continues to talk to the camera, gesturing with her hands and occasionally touching her face to draw attention to the makeup.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 最近小盒子📬. (2) [Variety]: 整個被塞爆❤️‍🔥. [Slogan]: 🇰🇷韓國流行 唇妝畫法來了💄. (3) [Subtitle]: 就是 無痛豐唇 自帶光圈. (4) [Subtitle]: 🇰🇷 멀멀립 MulMul Lip ✨. (5) [Subtitle]: 就是那種自然裸色 帶微微水光的感覺. (6) [Subtitle]: 這個妝最重要的就是 最後那滴光 還有教大家 怎麼讓妝感更持久✨. (7) [Subtitle]: 1. 先用水唇釉在整個嘴唇打底. (8) [Subtitle]: 記得要完全乾. (9) [Subtitle]: 2. 用氣墊粉撲輕點點整個嘴唇. (10) [Subtitle]: 3. 再用 MLBB 色系的唇膏把基本色鋪好. (11) [Subtitle]: 4. 用唇線筆把嘴唇稍微延伸一下. (12) [Subtitle]: 5. 上光澤唇油. (13) [Variety]: 這個顏色真的超好看 😍. (14) [Subtitle]: 不是常見的粉色 是更高級的羅玫瑰色. [Logo]: ANNAEVERYDAY 純萃恆潤綻采美唇油. (15) [Subtitle]: 輕輕疊上去就能完成 現在韓國超流行的 멀멀 립 MulMul Lip. (16) [Subtitle]: 後來才發現 ANNAEVERYDAY 美唇油 是日本製造的 🇯🇵. (17) [Logo]: ANNAEVERYDAY 美唇油. (18) [Subtitle]: 蜜釀杏桃 純粹赤韻 兩個顏色我都好喜歡. (19) [Subtitle]: 這款美唇油 本來就是 以保養為主軸設計. (20) [Subtitle]: 90%的角鯊烷高含量. (21) [Subtitle]: 擦上唇後自然不黏 還很保濕讓嘴唇更柔軟飽滿. (22) [Subtitle]: 再搭配這個 316L 不鏽鋼 SPA 頭. (23) [Subtitle]: 冰冰滑滑的 塗起來不拉扯 唇部很滑順舒服. (24) [Subtitle]: 最加分的是 這一支 不用卸妝！不用另外用眼唇卸. (25) [Subtitle]: (上唇時) (溫水擦除後) 不會染色因此可以把它當成唇部保養在用. (26) [Subtitle]: 顏色也是食用級的 完全沒負擔！ (27) [Subtitle]: 也很適合嘴唇容易敏感的人. (28) [Subtitle]: 它有通過 德國 Dermatest 敏感肌 最高等級認證. (29) [Subtitle]: 也是採用日本母嬰等級 Vegan 的配方. (30) [Subtitle]: 用起來完全不刺激. (31) [Subtitle]: 想要那種 唇部質感被升級的 光澤感嗎？但又不喜歡刺激又黏的？ (32) [Subtitle]: 那你一定要試試看 這個 ANNAEVERYDAY 的這一支美唇油. [Logo]: ANNAEVERYDAY 美唇油.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Asian woman with dark hair and bangs, wearing a mauve knit sweater and vibrant makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Brightly lit indoor room with a plain wall and a partially visible shutter.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic female voice speaking Traditional Chinese at a moderate tempo. Her tone is friendly and welcoming, suggesting a direct address to her audience. In the background, a light-hearted acoustic pop track plays, featuring a steady strumming acoustic guitar and a gentle piano melody. The beat is subtle, providing a rhythmic foundation without overpowering the speech. (2) As the narrator transitions into the instructional part of the video, her vocal delivery remains clear and well-enunciated. Each step is punctuated by a short, bright "ding" sound effect, signifying a new tip or action. The background music maintains its upbeat and consistent energy, perfectly synchronized with the visual pacing of the tutorial. (3) The speaker's volume increases slightly when highlighting specific benefits of the product, such as its hydrating properties and high-quality ingredients. A subtle "whoosh" sound effect is used during scene transitions, adding a professional production feel. The ambient noise is minimal, indicating a quiet, indoor recording environment that prioritizes vocal clarity. (4) In the final phase, the narrator's voice adopts a more persuasive and enthusiastic tone, emphasizing that the product does not require makeup remover. The music swells slightly in volume before fading out as the video ends. The overall audio quality is clean and studio-like, with a high signal-to-noise ratio that ensures the instructions are easily understood.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Tutorial -> Product Demonstration -> Endorsement/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a beauty tutorial demonstrating a specific Korean-style lip makeup technique while promoting lip products from the brand ANNAEVERYDAY, highlighting their effectiveness and ingredients.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of the product, display of brand logo, and explanation of product features.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A well-produced short-form beauty ad emphasizing specific aesthetic results and product safety.
